name: Who is There?
short_description: Who Is There is a single-player action-horror game. You have to find a safe place to hide from the shadows.
detailed_description:
Who Is There is a horror first-person shooter designed to instill fear in the player.
You have to fight the shadows and find a safe place. You need to interact with objects, be careful, explore all corners in order to survive.

Functions:

Location exploration - You have to explore the location to find things that will help you survive.
Puzzle Solving - To progress further, you will need to solve problems and puzzles.
Action - Enemies won't let you just pass, and you'll need to fight to survive.

The game is being developed by one person, and I will be glad for your support.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
